transform.js: const drag=variables['adm00014-0000-0000-0000-000000000014']; const myId=context?.item?.data?.id; const myIdx=context?.item?.data?.index; if(!drag?.cardId) return 'translateY(0px)'; const si=drag.sourceIndex; const ti=drag.targetIndex; const sh=36; if(myId===drag.cardId) return 'translateY(0px)'; if(myIdx>si&&myIdx<=ti) return 'translateY(-'+sh+'px)'; if(myIdx<si&&myIdx>=ti) return 'translateY('+sh+'px)'; return 'translateY(0px)';

text.formula: (() => { const total = collections['ad000004-0000-0000-0000-000000000004']?.total || 0; const page = variables['adm00017-0000-0000-0000-000000000017'] || 1; const size = variables['adm00016-0000-0000-0000-000000000016'] || 10; const from = Math.min((page - 1) * size + 1, total); const to = Math.min(page * size, total); return total === 0 ? '0 results' : from + '–' + to + ' of ' + total + ' results'; })()
